title: teucrium japonicum var. tsungmingense
intro: Teucrium japonicum var. tsungmingense, also known as Tsungming Teucrium or Japanese Germander, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tsungming Teucrium include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potential applications in treating respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Tsungming Teucrium may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic properties.
